name: Bandu - DnB: GApple
description:
"Holy shit that was exhausting..."

(Wowza!! Some people actually like this silly little goober!))

Bandu has 11 phones rotating around him. He is made with 3D shapes, just like most characters of DnB GApple, with his farmer hat resembling Bambi's, his semi-circle torso, and his tube legs. If he had more detail, he would wear an oversized green sweater, with his signature farmer hat, and blue pants, along with his 11 phones rotating clockwise around his torso. He's Expunged's brother. He loves phones, is quite a kind guy even if he cusses sometimes, and he makes a furry cosplay when he's bored.
creator: YaBoiClovah
